text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Aww... I can't find her. Any luck, Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Negative. Target has disappeared from my
sensors. Recommencing search...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ah! Bourbon, over there!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I won't let her escape! Mayano, prioritize your
objective.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Copy that! I'll handle my mission myself, so go on
without me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clatter!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I observed Rice entering this classroom. Will you
point me—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh, she left as soon as you entered...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...!
Not again...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Rice, wait!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Bourbon?! Why do you look so tired?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I kept... losing you right when I saw you... But
now, I have finally caught up.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? So you've... been looking for me for a
while?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm so sorry! It's all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Do not apologize. In fact, chasing after you has
considerably improved the efficiency of my quick
heel turns. It's all thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: All thanks to... me?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Also, happy White Day. Here is my return gift for
the Valentine's chocolate you gave me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Completing Operation Gift... Will you accept my
feelings of gratitude?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon... Y-yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Brian, I finally found you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What is it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Are you serious?! Today's White Day! I gave you
chocolates on Valentine's, remember?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That sickly sweet blob of cocoa?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?! It was the perfect sweetness! You can't go wrong with the chocolate from Chocolatime!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, that's not the point! You owe me! It's White
Day!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh. So that's it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'll give you what you want.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Gimme the makeup that grown-ups
use! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You want to race. That'll get your blood
pumping, won't it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Kssh! Get ready to lose. Copy?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh... Come on, let's do this.
